title: Develop a crop regulation program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop a crop regulation program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assess crop regulation methods

pcs.text: Identify production targets and requirements, including quantity, quality and availability of specified crops
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify production targets and requirements, including quantity, quality and availability of specified crops?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify production targets and requirements, including quantity, quality and availability of specified crops.

pcs.text: Research the characteristics and growing requirements of plant species and cultivars that may affect the crop regulation program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research the characteristics and growing requirements of plant species and cultivars that may affect the crop regulation program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research the characteristics and growing requirements of plant species and cultivars that may affect the crop regulation program.

pcs.text: Assess the benefits and limitations of available crop regulation methods for specified crops
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the benefits and limitations of available crop regulation methods for specified crops?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the benefits and limitations of available crop regulation methods for specified crops.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and assess risks associated with program, and develop, document and cost control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and assess risks associated with program, and develop, document and cost control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and assess risks associated with program, and develop, document and cost control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Determine cost-effective approach to crop regulation, and submit to management for approval
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine cost-effective approach to crop regulation, and submit to management for approval?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine cost-effective approach to crop regulation, and submit to management for approval.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Assess crop regulation methods

elements.title: Identify the requirements of a crop regulation program

pcs.text: Develop crop regulation program to achieve appropriate yield and quality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop crop regulation program to achieve appropriate yield and quality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop crop regulation program to achieve appropriate yield and quality.

pcs.text: Identify and confirm availability of resources, tools, equipment and machinery for the program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and confirm availability of resources, tools, equipment and machinery for the program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and confirm availability of resources, tools, equipment and machinery for the program.

pcs.text: Determine timelines for crop regulation activities, taking into account the needs of the crop and site conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine timelines for crop regulation activities, taking into account the needs of the crop and site conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine timelines for crop regulation activities, taking into account the needs of the crop and site conditions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify the requirements of a crop regulation program

elements.title: Prepare and document the crop regulation program and specifications

pcs.text: Prepare and document the crop regulation plan, specifications and quotation based on the requirements of the program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and document the crop regulation plan, specifications and quotation based on the requirements of the program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and document the crop regulation plan, specifications and quotation based on the requirements of the program.

pcs.text: Develop and document on-site procedures and schedule of activities for the program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and document on-site procedures and schedule of activities for the program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and document on-site procedures and schedule of activities for the program.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Prepare and document the crop regulation program and specifications

elements.title: Monitor the crop regulation program

pcs.text: Communicate the crop regulation plan, specifications, on-site procedures and schedule of activities to staff
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate the crop regulation plan, specifications, on-site procedures and schedule of activities to staff?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate the crop regulation plan, specifications, on-site procedures and schedule of activities to staff.

pcs.text: Monitor program implementation to ensure requirements of the production plan are achieved
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor program implementation to ensure requirements of the production plan are achieved?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor program implementation to ensure requirements of the production plan are achieved.

pcs.text: Review and refine program to ensure it is responsive to changing conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review and refine program to ensure it is responsive to changing conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review and refine program to ensure it is responsive to changing conditions.

pcs.text: Identify non-compliance with documented objectives and specifications, and implement remedial actions to alleviate or overcome identified shortcomings in program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify non-compliance with documented objectives and specifications, and implement remedial actions to alleviate or overcome identified shortcomings in program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify non-compliance with documented objectives and specifications, and implement remedial actions to alleviate or overcome identified shortcomings in program.

pcs.text: Identify and document remediation action, and report to management
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and document remediation action, and report to management?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and document remediation action, and report to management.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Monitor the crop regulation program

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
